# mlir-opt --convert-to-llvm crashes on extremely high-rank memref due to stride size overflow

**Author:** Subway2023
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/177816
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** mlir, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2026-01-29T10:13:47Z

## Body

# Description
Running mlir-opt --convert-to-llvm on a module containing an extremely high-rank memref.global causes an assertion failure in makeCanonicalStridedLayoutExpr

# Reproduce
mlir-opt version: 22.1.0-rc1
location: If the **memref.global** operation is commented out, the crash no longer occurs.

```mlir
module {
  memref.global "private" constant @__constant_ : memref<>
}
```
```
mlir-opt --convert-to-llvm test.mlir
```
```
mlir-opt: /mnt/sdd1/sbw/mlir/tool/llvm-project-llvmorg-22.1.0-rc1/mlir/lib/IR/BuiltinTypes.cpp:879: mlir::AffineExpr mlir::makeCanonicalStridedLayoutExpr(llvm::ArrayRef<long int>, llvm::ArrayRef<AffineExpr>, MLIRContext*): Assertion `runningSize > 0 && "integer overflow in size computation"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace and instructions to reproduce the bug.
Stack dump:
```

### Comment 1 - llvmbot


@llvm/issue-subscribers-mlir

Author: None (Subway2023)

<details>
# Description
Running mlir-opt --convert-to-llvm on a module containing an extremely high-rank memref.global causes an assertion failure in makeCanonicalStridedLayoutExpr

# Reproduce
mlir-opt version: 22.1.0-rc1
location: If the **memref.global** operation is commented out, the crash no longer occurs.

```mlir
module {
  memref.global "private" constant @<!-- -->__constant_ : memref&lt;&gt;
}
```
```
mlir-opt --convert-to-llvm test.mlir
```
